original_frontmatter_snapshot.name: linear-deep-dive
original_frontmatter_snapshot.description: Use when given a Linear issue ID, URL, identifier, or project name/URL to analyze and plan work. For issues, fetches the issue, classifies it, explores relevant code, proposes an approach, and orchestrates the right skills. For projects, fetches the project with milestones and issues, builds a prioritized execution plan, and systematically works through issues respecting project structure and dependencies.
